T0_local_approx: 2026-05-25 late evening Asia/Bangkok (Day 2 fired same calendar day as Day 1 — Non requested it ahead of schedule)
notes: Day 2 ran wide — covered both parents' lives, paternal grandparents, nanny Boun Som, chronological order of family deaths, the maternal family name (Jamsuan, encoded as the C middle initial in Non's own self-styled name 'Non C. Arkaraprasertkul'), the 3M baht university-tie payoff, and a closing 'I made it' reflection. New through-line surfaced: Non's name itself encodes both lineages (paternal Saehaeng/Heng/Wang via Arkaraprasertkul, maternal Jamsuan via the C initial). New ⤬ intra-day tension on parents/upbringing: 'nothing to forgive' (Day 1) + 'could not forgive parents for not recognizing my genius' (Day 1) + 'it could have been less painful — but the pain made me' (Day 2). Three positions triangulate rather than contradict — Phase 7 (Day 76) has richer material to ask from.
